modules.text: Stay on track with each phase of the hackathon — from registration to final presentations. Know when to submit, what to expect, and how to prepare at every stage. Follow the guidelines to make the most of your Seqathon 2025 journey!

modules.title: Eligibility
modules.text:
• Open exclusively to all currently enrolled engineering college students, regardless of branch or year of study.

  • Participants must provide an approval letter from their respective college principal to confirm eligibility.

modules.title: Team Formation
modules.text:
• Each team must consist of a minimum of 2 and a maximum of 4 students.

  • All members must be from an engineering college (can be from different branches or years).

modules.title: Event Structure & Fees
modules.text:
• Level 1: Participation is free of charge.

  • Final Round: Teams advancing to the final round must pay a nominal fee of ₹400 per participant.

modules.title: Requirements
modules.text:
• Each team must bring their own laptops and any necessary hardware for the final project demonstration.
  • Participants must adhere to the event’s Code of Conduct to maintain a respectful and collaborative environment.
  • Any form of plagiarism or unethical conduct will result in immediate disqualification

Why Participate
  • Exciting Prizes: Compete for a total prize pool of ₹1,00,000.
  • Career Boost: Top performers get direct access to internship and career opportunities at SEQATO.
  • Expert Mentorship: Learn from SEQATO’s senior engineers and technology leaders through one-on-one mentorship.
  • Certificates: All finalists and winners will receive official certificates commemorating their achievement.
  • Exclusive Swag: All finalists will receive a limited-edition SEQATHON kit, including T-shirts and other exclusive merchandise.
